title: Blinding Squids
description: Gives squids a chance at getting away! Squids now leave behind a cloud of ink blinding those who pass through it! Applies also to glow squids with glowing also being applied
body: Squids now spew out proper ink! Squids when escaping no longer hit you with a barely noticeable particle effect but rather blinding ink. The glowing effect emitted by glow squids also help in finding caves whenever they shoot it out on hostile axolotls underground.
